identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4, Hero sections, and Stat numbers. Uppercase for H1/H2 is encouraged for 'Gym' feel.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI labels, and data tables.

layout_strategy.spacing_scale: 2x-3x standard. Use p-8, gap-8, p-12 for distinct sections.

grid_modes.marketing: The Tetris Grid (Bento) - Asymmetric, mix col-span-4 and col-span-8.
grid_modes.dashboard: High Density Grid - Tight gap-4, maximize screen real estate.

layout_strategy.border_radius: rounded-md (Sharp but accessible, not fully pill-shaped except buttons)

buttons.style: Solid sharp rectangles or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). High contrast.

cards.style: Flat background (#121212) with 1px border (#27272a). No drop shadow by default.

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 rounded-none focus:border-white focus:ring-0 px-0

navigation.style: Glassmorphism sticky header. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/50 border-b border-white/10

visual_enhancers.texture: Use a subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on the main background to avoid 'digital flatness'.

hero_background.desc: Man with barbell - High intensity dark mode hero

program_mass.desc: Muscle flex back shot - Mass gain representation

program_weight_loss.desc: Cardio air bike - Weight loss/High intensity

vip_lifestyle.desc: Man standing in dark room - Premium/Focus vibe

implementation_rules.file_extension: Use .js or .jsx extension. DO NOT use .tsx or .ts.
implementation_rules.prop_types: Since we are using JS, use PropTypes for component validation if needed, or keeping it simple.
implementation_rules.charts: Use recharts for progress tracking (weight, reps).
implementation_rules.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors + noise.
Avoid 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Barlow Condensed'.
Use 'Tetris Grid' for the landing page features section.
Ensure 'Start Free Trial' or 'Join VIP' buttons have high contrast (White text on Black or Accent).
Multilingual support: Prepare structure for i18n.
